title: Ouroboros Consensus
content:
- ### OntologyBlock
- ## About Ouroboros Consensus
  - Cardano
  - Developed by IOHK research team, peer-reviewed at CRYPTO 2017.

ontology.definition: A mathematically-verified PoS consensus protocol using slot leaders to validate transactions and add blocks. Divides time into epochs and slots, with stake pools randomly selected as slot leaders.
